commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Workboard modal and drawer dialog roles, focus trap/return handling, inert background behavior, screen-reader labels, CSS support, and focused UI tests.

PR surface: Source +221, Tests +157. Total +378 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection plus Lit's ref contract shows that typing in an open Workboard dialog triggers a rerender, the inline ref is treated as changed, and the saved return-focus target can be overwritten before close.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can address the ref lifecycle blocker and add the missing regression without changing product direction.

target.title: Harden Workboard modal and drawer accessibility
target.body:
## Summary
- Adds Workboard modal and drawer focus lifecycle handling for initial focus, Tab containment, Escape close, and opener focus restore.
- Marks Workboard background content inert and aria-hidden while a Workboard dialog layer is open.
- Adds focused Workboard view regressions for modal and drawer keyboard accessibility.

## Verification
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/workboard.test.ts
- OPENCLAW_OXLINT_SKIP_PREPARE=1 node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json ui/src/ui/views/workboard.ts ui/src/ui/views/workboard.test.ts
- pnpm tsgo:test:ui
- pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 ui/src/ui/views/workboard.ts ui/src/styles/workboard.css ui/src/ui/views/workboard.test.ts
- git diff --check
- Browser smoke: Vite at http://127.0.0.1:5177 mounted the real Workboard module in Chromium and verified dialog role/name, initial focus, inert background, Tab containment, and Escape focus return.

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Workboard card modal and detail drawer keep keyboard focus inside, close on Escape, return focus to the launcher, and expose useful dialog labels/descriptions.
Real environment tested: Local Vite Control UI dev server at http://127.0.0.1:5177 with Chromium Playwright against the real Workboard module.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: Browser smoke mounted seeded Workboard state, opened the New card modal and detail drawer, queried dialogs by role/name, pressed Tab and Escape, and checked activeElement plus inert and aria-hidden state.
Evidence after fix: Browser smoke passed; focused Vitest passed 27 Workboard view tests.
Observed result after fix: Modal focused the title input, drawer focused the dialog, background had inert and aria-hidden while open, Tab stayed in the drawer, and Escape restored focus to the opener.
What was not tested: Full gateway-backed Workboard data flow and screen-reader audio output.
target.author: bunsdev

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
